MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INI 'STRY (Deportment of industrial Policy and Pror- NOTIFICATION ivew Delhi, the 20th Au2ust, 2015 G.S.R. 647(T).—Whereas The draft Rules were fished to amend Calcium Carbide Rules, required by sub.:section (2) of section 29 of the Petroleum Act, 1934 (30 of 1934) vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion) number G.S.R. 364(E), dated the 6,, day of May, 2013 in the Gazette of India, Factli, Section Sub-Section fi) inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby, before the expiry of a period of forr"-fiee days from the date on which the copies of the Gazette containing the said notification were made available to the public; And, whereas, copies of the said Gazette were made available to the public on 6th day- of May, And, whereas. no objections and suggestions were received from the public on the said draft rules; Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by sections 4 of the Petroleum Act. 1934 (4 of 1934), the CentralGovernment hereby makes the following rules to amend the Calcium Carbide Rules, 1987, namely:-- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Calcium Carbide (Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their final publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Calcium Carbide Rules, 1937, in the first Schedule, against Article number 2, in column 4 under the :nadir. "Authority empowered to grant licence" for the existing entry, the following entry shall be substituted. namely:. "District Maaistrate", [F, No. 2(2)2014 -Expls.j LENDRA SINGH. it. Se y. The principal rules were published in the Gazette of 'India vide 'Notification No. G.S.R. 103(E) dated 18' 1987, Nlanzior„ Gevernmem or India Press, Ring Real, IvIttat%ri.
